content.question: What proportion of Hungarian school segregation is causally attributable to the 6- and 8-year optional track structure versus free primary-school choice, residential sorting, and Roma-specific legal violations?
content.reduction_path: Conduct quasi-experimental analysis isolating track selection from other segregation mechanisms, or undertake microsimulation modeling that removes the optional early-exit tracks while holding other system features constant and measures the estimated segregation reduction. Comparison with otherwise similar OECD systems that lack optional tracks (e.g., Nordic comprehensive models) could provide benchmark elasticity estimates.
